emails.subject: RE: Gas Agreement
emails.body: RE: Gas Agreement Gerald, Attached is an example of the how the Stagecoach consumption bands work for power and gas. The examples are broken out into 2 main areas: 1. Price True-Ups (Power and Gas Make Wholes, etc.) 2. Volumetric True-Ups (Gas Only) There are extensive notes at the bottom of each tab that explain how the true-ups work. Please let me know if you have any questions. Thanks for your help, John
